name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Momentum on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Momentum is building on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. After a whole Year of being under the orders of a tyrannical Governor, the masses are starting to say enough is enough!** First off, Action 4 Liberty is committed to the long term battle to ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN. So I'm happy to announce that the **Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act** , known as the [Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_introducing_the_unilateral_emergency_powers_repeal_act?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=2), just got three new co-authors today because of your calls and emails. Thanks to Representatives John Poston, Steve Drazkowski and Tim Miller for getting on board! Let's keep the momentum and make this extremely important legislation the new law of the land! Now, onto some even more exciting and encouraging news. The Minnesota Senate voted today for the first time since the new legislature took office, to End Walz' Emergency Powers. On a [vote of 38-29](https://www.action4liberty.com/four_democrats_join_senate_republicans_to_end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=3), there's a large majority of Senators who think it's time for our Republic to be restored. **More importantly, four Democrat senators joined all Republicans today in voting the right way. FOUR DEMOCRATS!** That means if the house members in those senators' districts voted the same way as their senator, then Walz' Emergency Powers would be terminated immediately! One of the Democrat senators that voted with us today is Senator David Tomassoni from Senate District 6. We know his Senate district quite well because we moved our field team up there in February. We moved up there because the two Con Artist House Reps in his district, Julie Sandstede and Dave Liselgard, reneged on their votes from last year. Instead of listening to their constituents, they are taking orders from the Metro Democrat Party Bosses who tell them they must protect Walz' Emergency Powers. Our pressure is so intense for Sandstede that she is jumping through hoops to save our own butt. First, she wrote a special column in the Mesabi Tribune. But that didn't convince enough of her voters. Secondly, she had the House Sergeant of Arms office call us to get us to remove our digital ads against her. But we didn't obey.
## [You Can Help Fund Those Ads](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=4)
Today she took to the House floor to explain why she conned her voters in voting a different way this year. And her explanation fell on deaf ears. She's in trouble! Julie Sandstede has a choice. Will she continue following the orders from the Metro Democrat Party Bosses or will she stand up for her voters, and End Walz' Emergency Powers? **I just alerted my team to ramp up the operations in Julie Sandstede's district and I put a new full time door knocker there. Every voter we meet represents one more potential vote against Julie Sandstede and against****Governor Walz in 2022.** If Julie Sandstede thinks she can make a little speech on the House floor and fool her voters, she's sadly mistaken. We reach more of her voters in one day than she does in a whole week! The math is not on her side. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=5) Let's make this warm weekend a huge success. Help us ramp up the pressure against Julie Sandstede and these other Con Artists! Don't give Julie and the other vulnerable Democrats the luxury of enjoying their weekend while tens of thousands of Minnesotans put out of work as a result of Governor Walz' shutdown still suffer! **[Please help us by donating $100 today. If that's too steep, consider making a contribution of $50 or even $25. Or if you have the ability, make a bigger impact with a donation of $500 which pays for 5 doorknockers on Saturday.](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=6)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=momentum_on_ending_w&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Biden's Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
The liberal media doesn't care... do you? Peter**There's a CRISIS on our southern border.** The Biden administration is trying to pretend it doesn't exist. The liberal media is all but ignoring it.**But the drug cartels, terrorists, and migrant caravans are taking every advantage! **[Join Congressman Fitzgerald: **Hold Biden Accountable!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [[ JOIN FITZGERALD ] - DEFEND OUR BORDERS!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Under President Trump, we cracked down on illegal immigration and worked to **[build the wall](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-t/) **and **[secure the border](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-i/).**It's the exact opposite under Joe Biden, and he set the stage from day one with his Executive Orders that opened up the border. Today, we're seeing the results:
* Southwest border crossings on pace for **highest in 20 years**
* Four arrested at the border whose names appeared on the **terrorism watch list**
* Migrant facilities at **700% over capacity**
* **COVID-positive** migrants released into border communities

**Joe Biden caused this crisis.****[Click here to help me HOLD HIM ACCOUNTABLE!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-d/)** -Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-h/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-k/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mtiike-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mtiike-ahkdjtlkr-o/)

| Peter,
Establishment figures on both sides of the aisle have made it clear where their allegiances lie.
Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and others desperately cling to an old GOP that prioritizes the interests of their corporate, PAC donors, and pursues an America Last agenda across the globe instead of taking action to help our people.
But it's clear that this is no longer the future for Republicans - going forward, we are the party that puts America First. Always.
---

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Women’s History Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Happy Women’s History Month! This month, it’s important for us to take time to recognize and celebrate women across the globe who have overcome obstacles and helped to make the world a better place.

Women’s History Month began right here in Sonoma County when the Education Task Force of the Sonoma County Commission on the Status of Women created Women’s History Week back in 1978. After nearly a decade of celebrating Women’s History Week, Congress officially declared March as Women’s History Month.

While we have much to celebrate this month, we still have a lot of work ahead of us to create a more equal nation — and just this week the House made huge strides by voting to reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act and the ERA.

It is time we take the necessary steps to ensure women across the nation feel safe and have the support they deserve. The Violence Against Women Act will help protect women against domestic violence, sexual assault, and dating violence by aiding the delivery of assistance to victims of these crimes.

Not only did we have the opportunity to reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act, but we voted to remove the deadline to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment. Our fight to enact the ERA has been ongoing and difficult and there should never be an end date on equality for all.

We are making incredible strides towards an equal and just nation. While we still have a long road ahead of us, please join me this month in celebrating all the women in our lives and those who came before us to pave the way for future generations!

Thank you for your support and for all that you do.

— Mike
Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e0d5d963-d588-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/f0cc46e3-d888-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGNjNDZlMy1kODg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rD6YgUDW-Pzm94SdSu2ISZeVQtkFfFa2BIOKROk3PLA=&id=103862631 Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa, CA 94581
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: March Madness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
March Madness is underway, and the eyes of the sports world are on our state. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470314?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**March Madness**_ March Madness is underway, and the eyes of the sports world are on our state. As a basketball fan, of course I’m excited to have the tournament back. But, more importantly, as a Hoosier I’m proud state leadership has put us in a position to safely host these games at our historic basketball venues throughout Indiana. We didn’t arrive at tip off time by accident. It took teamwork and leadership to get to this point. It is nice to see fans back in seats, even in limited capacity, and is a hopeful sign that we are nearing the end of the pandemic.

And speaking of teamwork, Hoosier Republicans are excited to have a new member—and familiar face—joining our team of statewide officials. Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb named State Representative and Indiana Republican Party Vice Chair Holli Sullivan as our new Secretary of State. Holli is a great choice to lead this important office and we are looking forward to working with her and supporting her efforts through 2022 and beyond. Holli has big shoes to fill and our state will remain ever grateful for Secretary Connie Lawson’s years of service to Indiana.

A different sort of March Madness is happening in Washington DC. A madness of special interest spending, a crisis of the administration’s own making at the border, and the president’s refusal or inability to hold a press conference. For a man who’s spent 50 years in Washington, President Biden’s first 50 days in the White House have been haphazard at best, incompetent at worst. The administration’s only “achievement” has been not messing up Operation Warp Speed and the vaccination role out efforts they inherited from the Trump/Pence Team.

I have faith that the complete Democrat control of Washington will be broken in 2022, but the work to do that starts now. Over the last few weeks, we’ve held our party reorganization elections at the county and district level and I’m happy to welcome our new and returning county and district leaders to the team. We have a lot of work to do between now and 2022!

Thank you

Kyle Hupfer

_**Photo:** L-R Governor Holcomb, former Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson, new Secretary of State Holli Sullivan and Indiana GOP Chair Kyle Hupfer._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Continued Investment in Indiana**_ On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** named Holli Sullivan as Indiana's next Secretary of State. Connie Lawson leaves big shoes to fill, but we're sure that Secretary Sullivan will hit the ground running and continue providing Hoosiers with great government service!
**_“I’m thrilled Rep. Holli Sullivan has accepted this new leadership role for I know she will serve Hoosiers with the same intellect, integrity and energy she brought to the General Assembly. Secretary of State Sullivan hits the ground running, building on the remarkable work Hoosiers have come to expect from the office during Connie Lawson’s historic tenure.” -Governor Holcomb_**
This week **Governor Holcomb** and the Indiana State Department of Health announced that [vaccine eligibility has been expanded to Hoosiers aged 45 and up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=15021d99b9&e=1acd9bb3d6). Indiana is continuing to set the bar for COVID-19 vaccine administration. During their weekly briefing **Governor Holcomb** & Dr. Box have said that Indiana has administered 85% of the vaccine doses we have received, up from the national average of 80%. In nearly 3 months time, 2.2 million doses of vaccine have been administered in Indiana. That means 1.3 million unique individuals have been vaccinated with more than 870,000 of those Hoosiers being fully vaccinated against COVID-19! If you are eligible to receive the COVID-19 vaccine visit [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5258818129&e=1acd9bb3d6) or call 211 to schedule an appointment.
To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=da7292fb44&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b5af02512&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b80c69d1a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_**Photo:**_ _L-R former Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Governor Holcomb, new Secretary of State Holli Sullivan_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Caucus to Fill Secretary Lawson's General Assembly Seat**_ On Tuesday Secretary Sullivan was sworn in as our new Secretary of State. To assume her new role as Secretary of State, Sullivan resigned as Indiana House District 78 representative. The Indiana Republican Party will release details for the District 78 caucus to fill the vacancy in the coming days.
---
|
---
| _**State Committee Elections**_ Over the weekend district chairs and vice chairs were elected to serve four year terms on the Indiana Republican State Committee. Congratulations and thank you to all of those selected to serve. Elections for State Party Chair, Vice Chair, Treasurer, and Secretary will be held next week. The full list of the state committee is: | **District** | **County** | **Office** | **Name**

|
---
| _**First Lady Receives COVID-19 Vaccine**_ Last week First Lady Janet Holcomb received the one shot COVID-19 vaccine at the mass vaccination clinic in Sellersburg.
_**"I'm thankful for the incredible team at the Indiana State Department of Health and those across the state helping to get Hoosiers vaccinated!" -First Lady Janet Holcomb**_
---
|
---
| _**COVID-19 Vaccine News**_ Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. COVID-19 vaccine eligibility expanded again this week to 45+ and there is another mass vaccination clinic this weekend in Gary. To find out if you’re eligible and to schedule your shot, call 211 or go to [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e9efd0429&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| _**HR1 Threatens Election Integrity**_ Democrat control in Washington could mean weakened election laws and would challenge the very notion of safe and secure elections. Under the Democrat plan, dozens of longstanding voting laws and procedures would be overturned. Things like Indiana’s rock-solid voter ID law would be cast aside by Pelosi, Biden and Schumer. If the Democrats get their way, our elections would be wide open for fraud and abuse.

Indiana is a national leader in election integrity. Our voter ID law is rock solid and has been affirmed as such by the Supreme Court. We don’t need Nancy Pelosi telling us how to run elections in Indiana. HR1 would be a disaster for our nation. This is one of the issues Chairman Kyle Hupfer is zeroed in on in his role as RNC General Counsel. We will fight the Democrat takeover of our elections. clean_body: March Madness is underway, and the eyes of the sports world are on our state. | | | | | | | | March Madness March Madness is underway, and the eyes of the sports world are on our state. As a basketball fan, of course I’m excited to have the tournament back. But, more importantly, as a Hoosier I’m proud state leadership has put us in a position to safely host these games at our historic basketball venues throughout Indiana. We didn’t arrive at tip off time by accident. It took teamwork and leadership to get to this point. It is nice to see fans back in seats, even in limited capacity, and is a hopeful sign that we are nearing the end of the pandemic. And speaking of teamwork, Hoosier Republicans are excited to have a new member—and familiar face—joining our team of statewide officials. Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb named State Representative and Indiana Republican Party Vice Chair Holli Sullivan as our new Secretary of State. Holli is a great choice to lead this important office and we are looking forward to working with her and supporting her efforts through 2022 and beyond. Holli has big shoes to fill and our state will remain ever grateful for Secretary Connie Lawson’s years of service to Indiana. A different sort of March Madness is happening in Washington DC. A madness of special interest spending, a crisis of the administration’s own making at the border, and the president’s refusal or inability to hold a press conference. For a man who’s spent 50 years in Washington, President Biden’s first 50 days in the White House have been haphazard at best, incompetent at worst. The administration’s only “achievement” has been not messing up Operation Warp Speed and the vaccination role out efforts they inherited from the Trump/Pence Team. I have faith that the complete Democrat control of Washington will be broken in 2022, but the work to do that starts now. Over the last few weeks, we’ve held our party reorganization elections at the county and district level and I’m happy to welcome our new and returning county and district leaders to the team. We have a lot of work to do between now and 2022! Thank you Kyle Hupfer Photo: L-R Governor Holcomb, former Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson, new Secretary of State Holli Sullivan and Indiana GOP Chair Kyle Hupfer. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Continued Investment in Indiana On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb named Holli Sullivan as Indiana's next Secretary of State. Connie Lawson leaves big shoes to fill, but we're sure that Secretary Sullivan will hit the ground running and continue providing Hoosiers with great government service! “I’m thrilled Rep. Holli Sullivan has accepted this new leadership role for I know she will serve Hoosiers with the same intellect, integrity and energy she brought to the General Assembly. Secretary of State Sullivan hits the ground running, building on the remarkable work Hoosiers have come to expect from the office during Connie Lawson’s historic tenure.” -Governor Holcomb This week Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health announced that . Indiana is continuing to set the bar for COVID-19 vaccine administration. During their weekly briefing Governor Holcomb & Dr. Box have said that Indiana has administered 85% of the vaccine doses we have received, up from the national average of 80%. In nearly 3 months time, 2.2 million doses of vaccine have been administered in Indiana. That means 1.3 million unique individuals have been vaccinated with more than 870,000 of those Hoosiers being fully vaccinated against COVID-19! If you are eligible to receive the COVID-19 vaccine visit or call 211 to schedule an appointment. To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , , and ! Photo: L-R former Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Governor Holcomb, new Secretary of State Holli Sullivan | | | Caucus to Fill Secretary Lawson's General Assembly Seat On Tuesday Secretary Sullivan was sworn in as our new Secretary of State. To assume her new role as Secretary of State, Sullivan resigned as Indiana House District 78 representative. The Indiana Republican Party will release details for the District 78 caucus to fill the vacancy in the coming days. | | State Committee Elections Over the weekend district chairs and vice chairs were elected to serve four year terms on the Indiana Republican State Committee. Congratulations and thank you to all of those selected to serve. Elections for State Party Chair, Vice Chair, Treasurer, and Secretary will be held next week. "I'm thankful for the incredible team at the Indiana State Department of Health and those across the state helping to get Hoosiers vaccinated!" -First Lady Janet Holcomb | | COVID-19 Vaccine News Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. COVID-19 vaccine eligibility expanded again this week to 45+ and there is another mass vaccination clinic this weekend in Gary. Friend, California residents are leading the charge to remove Gov. Gavin Newsom from office after his FAILURE to open schools, relieve businesses, provide an effective vaccine plan, and get residents the assistance they need to get through this difficult time.
Many Californians have spoken out against him, but we want to see what _all_ of America thinks. That's why we launched our official poll to gauge his support. Unfortunately, when we checked our results we didn't see your response on our results list.
**We 're reaching out one final time hoping you'll give your input. subject: Biden's Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: paid for by _you_** **3\
body:
Biden's Campaign Promises Have Brought Thousands To Our Borders | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

**_There is a crisis at our Southern border._**

Over these last few weeks, we've seen people traveling thousands of miles to enter our country illegally _because they think they can get away with it._
---
| _The truth is that Biden and his Democratic allies have invited them here with promises such as:_

**1\. A freeze on all deportations** **2\. The promise of free healthcare, paid for by _you_** **3\. A path to citizenship for all illegal immigrants in the country**
**_They're even wearing shirts with Biden's campaign logo!_**
---
| [Chip in $50 to help us fight back](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=68baeaa3ae&e=1050d051da "Chip in $50 to help us fight back")

|
---
| [$100](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=aebd7ea390&e=1050d051da "$100")
---
| This week Rep. LaTurner had the chance to question Secretary Mayorkas about this topic. _**It is undeniable that Biden's promises and policy brought us to the crisis we see today.**_

You see Congressman LaTurner questioning the Secretary [HERE.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=88c5214790&e=1050d051da)
---
| [$500](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b7e106b543&e=1050d051da "$500")
---
| This is a massive national security threat. Instead of recognizing this and working to fix it, **Biden and the Democrats are passing the blame and ignoring the issue.**

Congressman LaTurner is working tirelessly to make sure our country is safe, but we need to make sure Nancy Pelosi loses the Speaker's gavel in 2022, so a crisis like this will never go unaddressed again.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---

Friend, I'll be blunt. I'm asking for your support. Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are mobilizing Liberals across the country to help them expand their Majority. **Without a doubt, my seat is at the top of their target list.** How do I know? Because ever since I ran for Congress to take back my district, I've been constantly under fire by the Left. My seat was deemed "Likely D," and the Democrats were certain that an immigrant, conservative woman stood no chance at winning. But with your help, we sent shockwaves through Washington. Now, they've put an even larger target on my seat. With their never-ending campaign war chests, Pelosi's Rolodex, and dark money donors willing to flood our district with cash, we have to be ready. I am counting on you and my entire grassroots team to be in this fight with me. _**Will you make a contribution before midnight tonight to help me defend my name, my seat, and our House Majority? **_ | | [**PITCH IN $10**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00176xmOIB0nrNkuK4LS0dACVTAVK6udInYtpJhUpioorAK1GFuN2_oNhUc028_bD9rRMS1nINN5rbyW5J2EdumFKn_ckQNNsmCnrzkHwn-vll2B6HjVw08Oro3PMCTEKq53L-1daPo-KZ6qgVcKKzf-HibDg-kkRUh-nf43utlvJVfYWwqEmxM7El1X1bWG-OV8UF2pzF7gYdlBH8q1sRCMKItjxqrRPAOpTu4yVOWn8vNVQeQTIzS7vRdew0hawULlCMLT3By_xZ3lG9DVQJ5rj8Zp46js43orjC3GMckXAOmHHfijL84p3p-T3FDZ1N2-mNlWeRhivN4n3qrvuGP6Wwv3H9odI_WYJiJgP21BPHAfwk6pVVdRj4EYNuEBzdiYKoQz_vS0yBersKhqUYbHCPTvF-2iz34XhNcFvzV1CJtS6-DGLAjlyr4TdAypazQMXYHAM2R1LroAWjjT_psKKHK4mrazJrT7Sa3hYY1u06JmdciVVO9T2axM_cGbCMZ&c=F42Og79wFmV6blBhZvDBlejO5nqwiYO8P4rReu195iw6dLXXBp1YQA==&ch=55pWxQfF1fhsYL_h8PMF76SOmzGjLrwa9kE-M8lpKr8St_i7DERP6w==)

clean_body: I'll be blunt. I'm asking for your support. == Friend, I'll be blunt. I'm asking for your support. Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are mobilizing Liberals across the country to help them expand their Majority. Without a doubt, my seat is at the top of their target list. How do I know? Because ever since I ran for Congress to take back my district, I've been constantly under fire by the Left. My seat was deemed "Likely D," and the Democrats were certain that an immigrant, conservative woman stood no chance at winning. But with your help, we sent shockwaves through Washington. Now, they've put an even larger target on my seat. With their never-ending campaign war chests, Pelosi's Rolodex, and dark money donors willing to flood our district with cash, we have to be ready. I am counting on you and my entire grassroots team to be in this fight with me. Will you make a contribution before midnight tonight to help me defend my name, my seat, and our House Majority? | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == My goal is to ensure every American -- on either side of the aisle -- is able to live a happy, healthy, and fulfilling life. To do that, we have to restore a common sense, conservative agenda to Congress. Now, we are closer than ever before with only FIVE seats standing between us and the Majority. It's going to be hard, but if we all do our part, I know we can protect this seat. == Anything you're able to give is greatly appreciated. body:
The crisis at the border has SKYROCKETED at the hands of the Biden Administration.
**REPORT: Biden admin says "Southwest border crossings on pace for highest levels in 20 years"**
Friend --

_Did you see this?_

The crisis at the border has **SKYROCKETED** at the hands of the Biden Administration. -> Unaccompanied minor Migrant numbers have TRIPLED
-> Over 100,000 detained at the border
-> Border crossings are at the HIGHEST levels in 20 years The border is at a breaking point and there is only one thing that needs to be done: Joe Biden needs to resume the construction on the border wall.

name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: We’re building out our endorsement list!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
The 86th District is a diverse and interesting swath of the Commonwealth and I’m honored to have growing support in all corners of the district. Now, we need to capitalize on this momentum.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26471408/277066972/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIzZDA0OC1lZDg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkV_7IJaqA5Gf_3Zy2MQRHHZ1jcqD4LXTHDGN6uM4wk=) Derek, It’s becoming clearer and clearer every day: Virginia is facing a housing crisis. And we’re seeing that right in our communities here in the 86th District. The simple fact is that we are in desperate need of quality affordable housing that will serve our middle class. Nothing has shone a light on this more than the COVID-19 pandemic -- as so many of our neighbors from across the commonwealth are facing evictions. **To put it in perspective: Virginia has 5 of the cities with the highest rates of eviction in the entire country. We must do better. We can do better.** That’s why I am running on a platform of promoting these issues and will continue to promote them in creative ways, and with that in mind, I created the video below that I hope you’ll find helpful. In it, you’ll hear my breakdown of how we got to this boing and the bold, creative, and progressive solutions that we can employ to work our way out of it. If you like what you hear in the video, and want to support my campaign and ensure that we continue to have progressive representation in Richmond fighting tirelessly for this issue -- consider chipping in. [**Click here or on the thumbnail below to watch the video!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26471409/277066974/-1881050197?refcode=210319_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIzZDA0OC1lZDg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkV_7IJaqA5Gf_3Zy2MQRHHZ1jcqD4LXTHDGN6uM4wk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26471410/277066975/-1881050197?refcode=210319_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIzZDA0OC1lZDg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkV_7IJaqA5Gf_3Zy2MQRHHZ1jcqD4LXTHDGN6uM4wk=) We have the tools necessary to fix this pressing issue. And with persistence and urgency, I am confident that together we can make a difference. Thanks for watching,
Ibraheem Samirah
| Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26471411/277066976/-1881050197?refcode=210319_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIzZDA0OC1lZDg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkV_7IJaqA5Gf_3Zy2MQRHHZ1jcqD4LXTHDGN6uM4wk=)
---

2556 Thorncroft Place
Herndon, VA 20171

name: Team Cammack
subject: She is joining Rand Paul
body:
Kat is pushing back against big government
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016wMmkvXqgGsdDmBamQdRjTa01It0rCGy238bjaoXU6ZJOxCPpK3aOd66Y7mPZl6BO81HK_GAtZD6wgtjBWGYQYjC9uoTnW0poZJHiMttXnkV8Uyr8V3TQexTbbo7XFsTheqcXzTeXC8umu3LJGcGz9JG7G_nALWRc9hIpXursPnwTLi0Zohu0A==&c=XWO2rsrC3xxndfQoW8U497uwsE3F66lY1Qdo-8ex71H5HWawebJPlw==&ch=3J16pNnuyho6UZ7a26rC9GB3ka2lV1eB2rX8w53bFLjiwq61p8keqg==)
---
| Patriot,
Kat is proud to introduce a new bill that pushes back against the big-government DC Swamp - the Regulations from the Executive In Need of Scrutiny (REINS) Act of 2021.
This bill would take BACK Congressional power that has been slowly eroded by overzealous presidents and unelected bureaucrats. It would allow for major rules in federal agencies to be legislated and not mandated by presidents like Joe Biden.
This bill would make sure our government is accountable to the PEOPLE, not an authoritarian in the White House!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016wMmkvXqgGsdDmBamQdRjTa01It0rCGy238bjaoXU6ZJOxCPpK3aOd66Y7mPZl6BO81HK_GAtZD6wgtjBWGYQYjC9uoTnW0poZJHiMttXnkV8Uyr8V3TQexTbbo7XFsTheqcXzTeXC8umu3LJGcGz9JG7G_nALWRc9hIpXursPnwTLi0Zohu0A==&c=XWO2rsrC3xxndfQoW8U497uwsE3F66lY1Qdo-8ex71H5HWawebJPlw==&ch=3J16pNnuyho6UZ7a26rC9GB3ka2lV1eB2rX8w53bFLjiwq61p8keqg==)
---
| | | [REEL IN EXECUTIVE POWER](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016wMmkvXqgGsdDmBamQdRjTa01It0rCGy238bjaoXU6ZJOxCPpK3aOd66Y7mPZl6BO81HK_GAtZD6wgtjBWGYQYjC9uoTnW0poZJHiMttXnkV8Uyr8V3TQexTbbo7XFsTheqcXzTeXC8umu3LJGcGz9JG7G_nALWRc9hIpXursPnwTLi0Zohu0A==&c=XWO2rsrC3xxndfQoW8U497uwsE3F66lY1Qdo-8ex71H5HWawebJPlw==&ch=3J16pNnuyho6UZ7a26rC9GB3ka2lV1eB2rX8w53bFLjiwq61p8keqg==)
---
| Kat said in a statement:
"The Constitution asserts the legislative branch's authority to make laws. We have to hold every presidential administration responsible for the rulemaking process regardless of party. It's about making sure the executive branch does not unduly overstep its vested authority through a necessary system of checks and balances."
Our Founding Fathers fought to establish our own self-government, and we cannot give up on their vision. Now is the chance to reel in some of this authoritarian power from an overbearing Left that has locked down our economies, shuttered schools, and pursued an all-out assault of our liberty.
Kat is backed by 110 of her colleagues co-sponsoring this bill. U.S. Senator Rand Paul introduced this legislation in the upper chamber and was backed by over 20 of his colleagues.
[Will you help Kat get this legislation through Congress?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016wMmkvXqgGsdDmBamQdRjTa01It0rCGy238bjaoXU6ZJOxCPpK3aOd66Y7mPZl6BO81HK_GAtZD6wgtjBWGYQYjC9uoTnW0poZJHiMttXnkV8Uyr8V3TQexTbbo7XFsTheqcXzTeXC8umu3LJGcGz9JG7G_nALWRc9hIpXursPnwTLi0Zohu0A==&c=XWO2rsrC3xxndfQoW8U497uwsE3F66lY1Qdo-8ex71H5HWawebJPlw==&ch=3J16pNnuyho6UZ7a26rC9GB3ka2lV1eB2rX8w53bFLjiwq61p8keqg==)

clean_body: Kat is pushing back against big government | | | | | | == | Patriot, Kat is proud to introduce a new bill that pushes back against the big-government DC Swamp - the Regulations from the Executive In Need of Scrutiny (REINS) Act of 2021. This bill would take BACK Congressional power that has been slowly eroded by overzealous presidents and unelected bureaucrats. It would allow for major rules in federal agencies to be legislated and not mandated by presidents like Joe Biden. This bill would make sure our government is accountable to the PEOPLE, not an authoritarian in the White House! | == | | | == | Kat said in a statement: "The Constitution asserts the legislative branch's authority to make laws. We have to hold every presidential administration responsible for the rulemaking process regardless of party. It's about making sure the executive branch does not unduly overstep its vested authority through a necessary system of checks and balances." Our Founding Fathers fought to establish our own self-government, and we cannot give up on their vision. Now is the chance to reel in some of this authoritarian power from an overbearing Left that has locked down our economies, shuttered schools, and pursued an all-out assault of our liberty. Kat is backed by 110 of her colleagues co-sponsoring this bill. U.S. Senator Rand Paul introduced this legislation in the upper chamber and was backed by over 20 of his colleagues. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: REVISED: Virginia is facing a housing crisis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
It’s becoming clearer and clearer every day: Virginia is facing a housing crisis. And we’re seeing that right in our communities here in the 86th District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26472192/277072077/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGM3NTk5Mi1lZjg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iu3YLajaIL0vsHc7WSakNzBE9AXSChS_xq-evm0w1Y=) _Note: The earlier version of this email was sent out under the incorrect subject line. Our apologies!_ Derek, It’s becoming clearer and clearer every day: Virginia is facing a housing crisis. And we’re seeing that right in our communities here in the 86th District. The simple fact is that we are in desperate need of quality affordable housing that will serve our middle class. Nothing has shone a light on this more than the COVID-19 pandemic -- as so many of our neighbors from across the commonwealth are facing evictions. **To put it in perspective: Virginia has 5 of the cities with the highest rates of eviction in the entire country. We must do better. We can do better.** That’s why I am running on a platform of promoting these issues and will continue to promote them in creative ways, and with that in mind, I created the video below that I hope you’ll find helpful. In it, you’ll hear my breakdown of how we got to this boing and the bold, creative, and progressive solutions that we can employ to work our way out of it. If you like what you hear in the video, and want to support my campaign and ensure that we continue to have progressive representation in Richmond fighting tirelessly for this issue -- consider chipping in. [**Click here or on the thumbnail below to watch the video!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26472193/277072079/-1881050197?refcode=210319_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGM3NTk5Mi1lZjg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iu3YLajaIL0vsHc7WSakNzBE9AXSChS_xq-evm0w1Y=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26472194/277072080/-1881050197?refcode=210319_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGM3NTk5Mi1lZjg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iu3YLajaIL0vsHc7WSakNzBE9AXSChS_xq-evm0w1Y=) We have the tools necessary to fix this pressing issue. And with persistence and urgency, I am confident that together we can make a difference. Thanks for watching,
Ibraheem Samirah
| Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. clean_body: It’s becoming clearer and clearer every day: Virginia is facing a housing crisis. And we’re seeing that right in our communities here in the 86th District. = Note: The earlier version of this email was sent out under the incorrect subject line. Our apologies! Derek, It’s becoming clearer and clearer every day: Virginia is facing a housing crisis. And we’re seeing that right in our communities here in the 86th District. The simple fact is that we are in desperate need of quality affordable housing that will serve our middle class. Nothing has shone a light on this more than the COVID-19 pandemic -- as so many of our neighbors from across the commonwealth are facing evictions. To put it in perspective: Virginia has 5 of the cities with the highest rates of eviction in the entire country. We must do better. We can do better. That’s why I am running on a platform of promoting these issues and will continue to promote them in creative ways, and with that in mind, I created the video below that I hope you’ll find helpful. In it, you’ll hear my breakdown of how we got to this boing and the bold, creative, and progressive solutions that we can employ to work our way out of it. If you like what you hear in the video, and want to support my campaign and ensure that we continue to have progressive representation in Richmond fighting tirelessly for this issue -- consider chipping in. = = We have the tools necessary to fix this pressing issue. And with persistence and urgency, I am confident that together we can make a difference. Thanks for watching, Ibraheem Samirah | Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign. | = Paid for by Samirah for Delegate Samirah 4 Delegate 2556 Thorncroft Place Herndon, VA 20171 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
The future of our Democracy depends on this.
****
Friend,
Democrats are pushing a dangerous attempt to nationalize elections, with total disregard for OUR Constitution, and [**it 's never been more critical that we stand for election security before it's too late.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KeFkdD0KbIRKHQlbEU5DZ1ptHy4S0sZrmk4JiRu0cEqUBr2UkANxlgs6eYtTpWn2lZZD5e9hgTueLAMEuFArdxR0JmugL6bsBjM6hiq6m6x8rgN16VNqmAjVlZm2_eR4as-E4c680I_SKO6l8b49F0ZZH_tg4-0tx9FVHYpbHmQ--XwrdS9S_XA47EeDT-FV9bSSR8liGa9dVXPeuETNv2_Gi922iAflXK_3iHnUhYc4o7wXEDP2C-X8eSTX_ZY5u9DvEXNnacLuqNdoyp01-f80cOsm6IcwtFN5MxXKQbFSP8pMMDTVAUM8QrcFy5GoBjuz1AKV4dvU5fWMdk_SCrQUUQW0ChDWPKV4ibW-CSCMP0pDX-Wo5tuvLfAHsRL1FnA--dLrxt1fFg3FZ2ebgCPhHwgOk_lf00r3h1-34JcavrFwZ4aJT3kJep1vg4EJyXY8n5LCtXe_x9eMWifQxw==&c=4a56Od8z4C4SI7ES_VQI7X1lm-tqt_rtAIJ9W_pucUGTDJbT5sQVRw==&ch=FTVkjh6VZAyH59XUFsNjx2OP7xw-YMoYbHLwlqQxDSEocqoKOY2EaQ==)

****
Radical Democrats claim their effort is "_essential for democracy!_ "

The truth is they don't care about real threats to election security. We do. State Republicans are working to restore integrity to our electoral process, but national Democrats are pushing a massive federal power grab through Congress to take control of local elections away from the states and give that power to THEMSELVES.

**Worst of all, their bill even includes taxpayer funding for their own reelection campaigns!**

Democrats are advertising their latest bill "For the People Act." They should really call this the "For the Corrupt Politicians Act".

Once again, they're assuming Americans are stupid and won't read the fine print.
[**Republican state leaders are our best and LAST line of defense against this LEFT-WING takeover --but they need our help. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KeFkdD0KbIRKHQlbEU5DZ1ptHy4S0sZrmk4JiRu0cEqUBr2UkANxlgs6eYtTpWn2lZZD5e9hgTueLAMEuFArdxR0JmugL6bsBjM6hiq6m6x8rgN16VNqmAjVlZm2_eR4as-E4c680I_SKO6l8b49F0ZZH_tg4-0tx9FVHYpbHmQ--XwrdS9S_XA47EeDT-FV9bSSR8liGa9dVXPeuETNv2_Gi922iAflXK_3iHnUhYc4o7wXEDP2C-X8eSTX_ZY5u9DvEXNnacLuqNdoyp01-f80cOsm6IcwtFN5MxXKQbFSP8pMMDTVAUM8QrcFy5GoBjuz1AKV4dvU5fWMdk_SCrQUUQW0ChDWPKV4ibW-CSCMP0pDX-Wo5tuvLfAHsRL1FnA--dLrxt1fFg3FZ2ebgCPhHwgOk_lf00r3h1-34JcavrFwZ4aJT3kJep1vg4EJyXY8n5LCtXe_x9eMWifQxw==&c=4a56Od8z4C4SI7ES_VQI7X1lm-tqt_rtAIJ9W_pucUGTDJbT5sQVRw==&ch=FTVkjh6VZAyH59XUFsNjx2OP7xw-YMoYbHLwlqQxDSEocqoKOY2EaQ==)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. The rest goes to their liberal wish list, helping special interests in the swamp.

| | Friend,

Nancy Pelosi and Washington D.C. power brokers are threatening our elections.

Representative Miller-Meeks won her 2020 election to represent Iowans in Congress and the bipartisan commission recounted and certified her election weeks later. It was a close race, but Rep. Miller-Meeks won fair and square.

Now, Nancy Pelosi's top priority is to nationalize our elections, infringing on our rights and wasting taxpayer dollars.

[Join our Republican team in standing up for election integrity today by signing our petition.](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=07280500e4&e=d48ad6f8f4)

* * *
Folks,
We know that Nevada is one of the most CRITICAL battleground states, and we know that Republicans will spend millions **_(AGAIN)_** to try and flip it back to red.
But there’s something else you need to know:
**__Nevada is a growing Democratic arena, with workers’ unions, climate activists, and social justice advocates leading the charge!__**
That’s why I was proud to call for Nevada to become the first state to name the Democratic candidate for President in 2024 -- but the only way we can make that happen is if we **keep Nevada blue in the midterms.**
And I have every confidence that Nevadans are ready to step up and fight to keep this swing state **solid blue.**
This grassroots coalition is made up of union members, schoolteachers, working-class families, environmental activists, people who dream of a government that puts them first -- _not the 1%._
**You’re our best shot at turning that dream into a reality.**

clean_body: | | | | | Let’s make this quick. Republicans are on track to take back the House AND the Senate in 2022... And Nevada will make or break who controls both chambers of congress. If we want to defend our Democratic Majority, it relies on protecting Susie Lee and Steven Horsford in the House and Catherine Cortez-Masto in the Senate. So we NEED to get a head start. Republicans will cough up millions of dollars in outside spending and even more from conservative mega-donors to flip Nevada red. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Folks, We know that Nevada is one of the most CRITICAL battleground states, and we know that Republicans will spend millions (AGAIN) to try and flip it back to red. But there’s something else you need to know: Nevada is a growing Democratic arena, with workers’ unions, climate activists, and social justice advocates leading the charge! That’s why I was proud to call for Nevada to become the first state to name the Democratic candidate for President in 2024 -- but the only way we can make that happen is if we keep Nevada blue in the midterms. And I have every confidence that Nevadans are ready to step up and fight to keep this swing state solid blue. This grassroots coalition is made up of union members, schoolteachers, working-class families, environmental activists, people who dream of a government that puts them first -- not the 1%. You’re our best shot at turning that dream into a reality. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for taking the time to read this message. Peter,

Now that things are beginning to return to normal and these lockdowns are finally ending, there’s no better time to get out there and support America’s small businesses!

**Throughout the pandemic, we lost over 100,000 small businesses, and the ones that are left are struggling to recover. It will be a long time before American small businesses fully recover.**

That's why Andrew asked us to put together a **[MAIN STREET DEFENSE TEAM](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=a6099ea81817463e9c8de80960804a8b&_e=y2HKVlfU9MUHS3hgvhEfV9FUqq9HmANVDsYWEJfJi_oSGIgcpxX436rIQEDRl-rK-ydMH4IPeSyXm5ivuk7-dNLprDqFLGFeBJLZtr8V7TGy9oPJic3uPUZbiYHYhkjvlbzIi2Av1echMQqUduBUvGn91IIkT4V3hXVQ0fy3O5RHA9K9Vkcd32cG9lr9TYXDA1Yfn_VY0g4Q-B1wZyRVzJx2U9Oih9wxvL7mT6gJTSZDrPLX_icmEWkaCX45o-AFfsUqZA0a14wngSz_ggMpQWbjA88VFwN_2pBuBAZG8wp1FKCXn3tfN6ICIdmIqRO_D8Lin513UFOvuyYfLnp0Mik52Ir8e527-k9nHjWOK_k7goVATRBVq3BAfUFiftXO4HOZrKqbYSEEhU_xU-GHvf146WKDO0ZAdU4p6an4Qqr3ooy4i4iWfEH2vZukee7l5VzxoACpRQLEFPDIrXNr0WWv_1pKaq4Chu9gI2z2uPaVYpvvKF9c-eZL-ZucIZ5tLgxx-6xoREZPizgyW11KgQ%3D%3D)** , which comprises a group of Americans who are tired of seeing big government crush small businesses in our communities!

Note from Chairman Stepanek
Derek,

Thank you for your continued support as we advance strong strides for Granite Staters! This week I would like to [invite you to attend our virtual Zoom fundraiser with the Honorable Mike Pompeo, taking place on March 29th.](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S5Pq3iVE4OD59T9yAdEPR7LjE-2FL2vmhU3UGDI386Lw3l63u4wxcz-2F8s8TH4TjBmxeegOkk1sdCtJ7q3sziEglac-3DpvNo_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HccUVZqYlR75vutKI09mdW5REre5B1qrY2ulAoFUq-2FxjNcY1I6RRkAOOME-2F1mor48j3Yr5KlsUmE9q0ybmhglYG04z5-2BRS-2Fj6HQy2zrdV0F-2Bq8crs6PkOKOt89-2FQ7ruouJL3SoI-2BCBX5iZFjddgfJSHbAGi3iE27zvlaln4C8emAFW3RYSWVgRnGOP-2BREoyCPsbt5-2F33pxxIaEzv0s9EjU2VOB7ABfVSwBbZKc9XByBYXFUL0cMoNpiM2qxjvihJuSCOPo0BgY967QU3bbSC7Gw-3D-3D) This fundraiser lends critical aid to our efforts to elect Bill Boyd as a State Representative in the Hillsborough District 21’s special election.

The Merrimack special election is a principal focus of the NHGOP in a continued campaign to strengthen our Republican leadership. The seat was last held by our own Speaker Dick Hinch, a deeply respected leader in our party who dedicated years to protecting conservative values. We are working tirelessly to ensure his legacy is preserved through our Republican candidate, to fight for his values.

Here in Concord, our Republican legislators have continued to work hard in expanding students’ educational freedom. Following Governor Chris Sununu's Executive Order to ensure students access to an in classroom education at least two days a week, our Republican Senate successfully advanced SB 130-FN. This bill provides Granite Staters access to education freedom accounts, giving parents the ability to choose the best possible academic opportunity for their child.

As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to [info@nhgop.org](mailto:info@nhgop.org)!

Sincerely,
**Stephen Stepanek**
**NHGOP Chairman**

**_Learn More about New Hampshire's Liberty House _**
|
---
**Located in Manchester, Liberty House is a charity dedicated to serving homeless and/or struggling Veterans. Their venue provides a safe, transitional living space that includes a sober recreation room and meeting area to provide further job training and seminars.**

**_ "... our veterans have worked together to rebuild confidence, enhance skills, and lead fulfilling substance-free lives. Liberty House has provided support and services to more than 300 formerly homeless veterans."_**

**If you're interested in learning more about Liberty House, or getting involved with their program, click the link below! **

Note from House Majority Leader Jason Osborne & Rep Judy Aron:
**Concord, NH- NH House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) and Rep. Judy Aron (R-Acworth) released the following statements in response to NH House Democratic Leader Renny Cushing (D-Hampton) referring to the majority as[“the most radical group of rejectionists that have assembled in the House in our history.”](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S2Sy5V4HXHYYiEIfLHLHvpR0NT5Zs-2F6B0WCJcgNzSnVe7-2BoYUNztGQg-2BY-2Bm2nbsncA-3D-3DXJLs_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HccUVZqYlR75vutKI09mdW5REre5B1qrY2ulAoFUq-2FxjNcY1I6RRkAOOME-2F1mor48j3Yr5KlsUmE9q0ybmhglYJdkWiF05diWVzOF-2BgYP4f06fgzKOpbcm-2FvrFw7ODEd7i58S4jDm80hKezFgW3PZSmfyfU3NusRGJgFdDRtYPilkUocVLbW2mhDVg0DGaF-2FiBq-2BAXwBNUGge-2FMFJjBzdTCBMptZCknX1wYge-2BdWfOLaookJGjBjw2IMZ282g-2FDlICz6ilEeNLPxnXu9FDFRinA-3D-3D)**

_**House Majority Leader Jason Osborne:**_

**“I’d like to take a moment to remind the Democratic Leader of reality. We’ve only held one session day to vote on legislation and House Democrats spent their entire day voting ‘no.’ They reject expanding education choice to allow parents a say in where their children attend school. They reject any tax relief and want to leave our small businesses struggling. They reject basic decorum and respect for their fellow legislators. They also reject showing up and performing the job their constituents elected them to do, and instead file frivolous lawsuits that the courts reject.” **

**“What does the Majority reject? We reject higher taxes on our citizens, including a sales and income tax. We reject increased mandates and taxes on our businesses that are struggling through the pandemic. We reject forcing students to stay in a school where they are struggling. We reject infringing upon the basic liberties of NH citizens. If the 2020 election proved anything, it’s that the citizens of New Hampshire reject these policies as well.”**

_**Rep. Judy Aron:**_

**“If I am going to be labeled a rejectionist by the Democratic Leader, I’d like to be clear on what it is I reject. I reject their assumption that everyone is a racist. I reject their attacks on those who do not agree with them, their ‘cancel culture,’ and their pursuit of squelching free thought and free speech. I reject their desire to disarm us all. I reject their desire to continue to increase our taxes until New Hampshire is indistinguishable from Massachusetts or California. I reject their desire to dismantle law and order. I reject their desire to ignore the Constitution; their need to erase history. But most of all, I reject their policies of divisiveness that perpetuates hate for our neighbor.”**

_**Senator Spotlight: Meet Denise Ricciardi of District 9**_
Our first Senator Spotlight highlights District 9's Denise Ricciardi of Bedford, New Hampshire!

Denise is a long standing community leader and volunteer, but her most recent legislation as Senator has expressed a true dedication to Granite Staters. In her first term, she advocated to bring critical funding back into local businesses, to the added benefit of all New Hampshire residents with SB99. The bill puts a financial cap on the annual increase of the state's Meals & Rooms Tax, ensuring that proper funds are redistributed back to their municipals. To see more on SB99, look to the official Senate news release below. Thank you Senator Ricciardi for being an empowering female leader who prioritizes her community!

To learn more about Denise and her priorities for New Hampshire - Click the link!

**NHFR is founding a new 'Lakes Region' Club! **
|
---
** **
**The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women is so excited to announce that we are starting another club! This will be our second new club this year. Support for our current clubs along with new club development is crucial to being organized for our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts! **

**The Lakes Region FRW is having their organizational meeting on April 20 at 7pm to elect their Executive Officers and approve their Bylaws. They need 10 female members to join for $35 as founding members to start their club! The Lakes Region FRW will aim to represent women in any town in the "lakes region" of NH and will be based in Belknap County. **

clean_body: | | secure.nh.gop secure.nh.gop mailto:info@nhgop.org?subject=re:%20Newsletter&body= Note from Chairman Stepanek Derek, Thank you for your continued support as we advance strong strides for Granite Staters! This week I would like to This fundraiser lends critical aid to our efforts to elect Bill Boyd as a State Representative in the Hillsborough District 21’s special election. The Merrimack special election is a principal focus of the NHGOP in a continued campaign to strengthen our Republican leadership. The seat was last held by our own Speaker Dick Hinch, a deeply respected leader in our party who dedicated years to protecting conservative values. We are working tirelessly to ensure his legacy is preserved through our Republican candidate, to fight for his values. Here in Concord, our Republican legislators have continued to work hard in expanding students’ educational freedom. Following Governor Chris Sununu's Executive Order to ensure students access to an in classroom education at least two days a week, our Republican Senate successfully advanced SB 130-FN. This bill provides Granite Staters access to education freedom accounts, giving parents the ability to choose the best possible academic opportunity for their child. As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to mailto:info@nhgop.org! Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | Governor Sununu's Latest Tweets: Learn More about New Hampshire's Liberty House | Located in Manchester, Liberty House is a charity dedicated to serving homeless and/or struggling Veterans. Their venue provides a safe, transitional living space that includes a sober recreation room and meeting area to provide further job training and seminars. We’ve only held one session day to vote on legislation and House Democrats spent their entire day voting ‘no.’ They reject expanding education choice to allow parents a say in where their children attend school. We reject higher taxes on our citizens, including a sales and income tax. We reject increased mandates and taxes on our businesses that are struggling through the pandemic. If the 2020 election proved anything, it’s that the citizens of New Hampshire reject these policies as well.” Rep. Judy Aron: “If I am going to be labeled a rejectionist by the Democratic Leader, I’d like to be clear on what it is I reject. I reject their assumption that everyone is a racist. I reject their attacks on those who do not agree with them, their ‘cancel culture,’ and their pursuit of squelching free thought and free speech. I reject their desire to disarm us all. I reject their desire to continue to increase our taxes until New Hampshire is indistinguishable from Massachusetts or California. I reject their desire to dismantle law and order. I reject their desire to ignore the Constitution; their need to erase history. But most of all, I reject their policies of divisiveness that perpetuates hate for our neighbor.” Now: Dem Leader tells the current GOP majority is "the most radical group of rejectionists that have assembled in the House in our history." -- John DiStaso (@jdistaso) Follow our State House Accounts: | | Upcoming Events | New Hampshire Happenings with the GOP Merrimack Special Election Update Help the NHGOP and the Committee to Elect House Republicans elect Bill Boyd in our upcoming Special Election! name: Tom Fitton
subject: Lawsuit for Info on Capitol Police Officer Death
body:
Court Slams Fetal Organ Sales

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR AUTOPSY OF CAPITOL POLICE OFFICER BRIAN
SICKNICK

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22395&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1rcGJDTnFyY2RVUSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==]

We’re not going to get the full truth of events at the Capitol on
January 6 from politicians or a dishonest media — no surprise there.
So were going after it on our own.

We filed a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
lawsuit in the District of Columbia Superior Court against the
District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian
Sicknick and related records (_Judicial Watch v. District of
Columbia_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22396&F=T&]
(Case
Number 2021 CA 000875 B)).

We sued after the Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) of the
District of Columbia denied our February 16, 2021, FOIA request for:

All records, including but not limited to autopsy reports, toxicology
reports, notes, photographs, and OCME officials’ electronic
communications, related to the death on Jan. 6, 2021 of Capitol Police
Officer Brian Sicknick and its related investigation.

Initial reports from the New York Times and other media outlets about
the cause of Officer Sicknick’s death have subsequently
been corrected and revised
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22397&F=T&].

The unusual and unlawful secrecy about Officer Sicknick’s death
investigation undermines public confidence in the fair administration
of justice.

We also recently filed lawsuits for U.S. Capitol Police emails and
video related to the riot
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22398&F=T&]
and
for Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s communications with the Pentagon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22399&F=T&]
in
the days after the January 6th incident.

It will be particularly interesting to see if any politicians such as
Nancy Pelosi or other outside officials communicated with the medical
examiner’s office about Officer Sicknick.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR NY, PA COVID NURSING HOMES POLICIES

New York Governor Andrew Cuomo is under fire for his policies that may
have resulted in countless preventable nursing home Covid-19 deaths.
But other states, such as Pennsylvania, had similar policies that
needlessly increased risk for the nursing home residents. Again, not
trusting the corrupted media or government to give us the full picture
of this scandal, Judicial Watch went to court for answers.

We sued the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for
records about New York and Pennsylvania nursing home policies and
procedures during the COVID-19 pandemic.

We filed the FOIA suit in the U.S. District Court for the District of
Columbia after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS)
failed to respond to a December 7, 2020, FOIA request (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health of Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22372&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW55LXBhLW51cnNpbmctaG9tZS1yZWNvcmRzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDYxMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=]
(No.
1:21-cv-00612)) for:

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Division
of Nursing Homes Director Evan Shulman and Pennsylvania Secretary of
Health Dr. Rachel Levine regarding policies and procedures for nursing
facilities during COVID-19. The timeframe of this request is February
18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Quality
and Safety Oversight Group Director David Wrightand Pennsylvania
Secretary of Health Dr. Rachel Levine regarding policies and
procedures for nursing facilities during COVID-19. The timeframe of
this request is February 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Division
of Nursing Homes Director Evan Shulman and Pennsylvania Deputy for
Quality Assurance Susan Coble regarding policies and procedures for
nursing facilities during COVID-19. The timeframe of this request is
February 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Quality
and Safety Oversight Group Director David Wright and Pennsylvania
Deputy for Quality Assurance Susan Coble regarding policies and
procedures for nursing facilities during COVID-19. The timeframe of
this request is February 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Division
of Nursing Homes Director Evan Shulman and New York Department of
Health Commissioner Howard Zucker regarding policies and procedures
for nursing facilities during COVID-19. The timeframe of this request
is February 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

Communications, including emails and text messages, between Qualityand
Safety Oversight Group Director David Wright and New York Department
of Health Executive Deputy Commissioner Sally Dreslin regarding
policies and procedures for nursing facilities during COVID-19. The
timeframe of this request is February 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020.

The U.S. Department of Justice and the U.S. Attorney’s Office in
Brooklyn are investigating New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo’s handling of
that state’s nursing homes during the pandemic. As of March 3, 2021,
15,430 nursing home and other long-term care residents in the state
have died from COVID-19, according to
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22373&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9udXJzaW5naG9tZTQxMS5vcmcvbnktbnVyc2luZ2hvbWUtY292aWQtZGF0YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=]
the New York
Long Term Care Community Coalition.

In February, Cuomo’s top aide reportedly admitted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22374&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDIvMTEvY3VvbW8tYWlkZS1hZG1pdHMtdGhleS1oaWQtbnVyc2luZy1ob21lLWRhdGEtZnJvbS1mZWRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==]
that
New York withheld information about the coronavirus death toll in the
state’s nursing homes out of fear that the true numbers would “be
used against us” by federal government.

In Pennsylvania, as of February 25, at least 12,000 of the
nearly 24,000 deaths
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22375&F=T&]
attributed
to coronavirus in that state reportedly occurred in nursing homes and
long-term care facilities. Republicans in the state legislature have
renewed calls for an investigation into how Gov. Tom Wolf’s
administration has dealt with these facilities, specifically the
state’s policy requiring that the facilities accept COVID-positive
patients.

According to a report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22376&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3BvdGxpZ2h0cGEub3JnL25ld3MvMjAyMC8wOS9wYS1udXJzaW5nLWhvbWUtY29yb25hdmlydXMtZGVhdGhzLWNhc2VzLXB1YmxpYy1kYXRhLW1pc3NpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzE5MjMxMDE0]
by
Spotlight PA, coronavirus reports from the Pennsylvania Department of
Health were “consistently missing data” on nursing homes. The
state’s health department was headed during most of the pandemic by
Dr. Rachel Levine, who has been nominated for a top position in HHS,
believe it or not, in the Biden administration.

Thousands of nursing home residents in New York and Pennsylvania may
have died thanks to those states’ COVID-19 mandates. The public,
particularly those who lost loved ones due to the policies of the
Cuomo and Wolf administrations, have a right to know the full truth
about this public health scandal.

COURT SLAMS POTENTIALLY ILLICIT SALES OF PARTS OF ABORTED FETUSES

In May 2019 we sued the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)
for Food and Drug Administration (FDA) documents about the purchase
and use of human fetal tissue obtained from abortion clinics that was
used by FDA researchers in “humanized mice” testing.

Then in February 2020 we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=17891&F=T&]
from
NIH showing that the agency paid thousands of dollars to
California-based Advanced Biosciences Resources (ABR) to purchase
organs from aborted human fetuses to create “humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==
for HIV research.

In June 2020, we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=19379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmRhLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==]
from
the FDA showing that, between 2012 and 2018, the FDA entered into
eight contracts worth $96,370 with ABR to acquire “fresh and never
frozen” tissue from first and second trimester aborted fetuses for
use in creating “humanized mice” for ongoing research.

We can now report a positive development in this case, which, in many
ways, has been a journey into a heart of darkness. A federal
court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW9yZGVyLTAwODc2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==]
HHS
to release additional information about its purchases of organs
harvested from aborted human fetuses.

The Court also found “there is reason to question” whether the
transactions violate federal law barring the sale of fetal organs.
Documents previously uncovered in this lawsuit show that the federal
government demanded the purchased fetal organs be “fresh and never
frozen.”

Both the FDA and NIH purchased the organs from ABR to create
“humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==
for use in HIV research. ABR partners with Planned Parenthood and
other abortion providers to dismember fetuses and sell their parts for
research. The decision
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22371&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW1lbW9yYW5kdW0tb3Bpbmlvbi0wMDg3Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=]
notes
that ABR:

sold second-trimester livers and thymi for hundreds of dollars apiece.
The same for brains, eyes, and lungs. After tacking on fees for
services like shipping and cleaning, ABR could collect over $2,000 on
a single fetus it purchased from Planned Parenthood for $60. The
federal government participated in this potentially illicit trade for
years.

The court raised concern about whether these transactions are legal:

Happily for the Government (and ABR), this means that the Court need
not reach Judicial Watch’s argument that the Government cannot
withhold the information at issue because ABR engaged in criminal
conduct. Recall that it is illegal to transfer “any human fetal
tissue for valuable consideration. 42 U.S.C. § 289g-2(a). Judicial
Watch contends that the invoices disclosed here show that the
Government paid “valuable consideration” to ABR and so the
Government cannot keep the withheld information confidential.

The court found it “dubious” that a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) exception invoked by the government could be used to “shield
illegal business practices under the guise of ‘confidential business
information’” and declared that “[t]here is reason to question
the lawfulness of the transaction between the Government and ABR.”

In ruling in our favor, U.S. District Court Judge Trevor N.
McFadden ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW9yZGVyLTAwODc2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxOTIzMTAxNA==]
HHS
to disclose:

Any currently withheld names and addresses of ABR’s contract
laboratories

Any redacted unit pricing information for fetal tissue, shipping, or
other fees and services relating to the 2013-2015 years that can found
in the fee schedules appended to the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee
report entitled “Human Fetal Tissue Research: Context and
Controversy”

Any redacted per-specimen pricing information for the second-trimester
fetal tissue relative to the 2016-2018 years

We initially filed this lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=17671&F=T&]
after
HHS failed to respond adequately to a September 2018 FOIA request
(_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department Health and Human Services _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22400&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMTkvMDMvSlctdi1ISFMtQWR2YW5jZWQtQmlvc2NpZW5jZXMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwODc2LnBkZl0oTm8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=.
1:19-cv-00876)). We asked for:

All contracts and related documentation between FDA and ABR for the
provision of human fetal tissue to be used in humanized mice research.

All records reflecting the disbursement of funds to ABR for the
provision of human fetal tissue to be used in humanized mice research.

All guidelines and procedural documents provided to ABR by FDA
relating to the acquisition and extraction of human fetal tissue for
its provision to the FDA for humanized mice research.

All communications between FDA officials and employees and
representatives of ABR related to the provision by ABR to the FDA of
human fetal tissue for the purpose of humanized mice research.

This court victory will shed additional light on the federal
government’s barbaric practice of purchasing organs of aborted human
beings. The American people deserve to know how their tax dollars are
being spent on this grotesque and potentially illegal activity.

U.S. LIFTS YEMENI MILITANT GROUP’S TERRORIST DESIGNATION

The Biden administration quickly undid a major Trump anti-terror
initiative in Yemen and is set to resume sending militants there with
millions of U.S. taxpayer dollars. Our _Corruption Chronicles _blog
reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22380&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL3VzLWxpZnRzLWhvdXRoaS1kZXNpZ25hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=]
the details.

Days after a “humanitarian situation” compelled the Biden
administration to revoke the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based
militant group, the U.S. is sending the Islamic nation $191 million
in assistance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22401&F=T&].
Yemen
is a hotbed of terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda
in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP). The international community strongly
opposed the Trump administration’s classification of another Yemeni
radical faction, Ansarallah, as a specially designated global
terrorist entity asserting that it would come with repercussions for
humanitarian operations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22402&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLnVuLm9yZy9lbi9zdG9yeS8yMDIxLzAyLzEwODM2MDI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=].
In a Federal
Register bulletin
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22403&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ292aW5mby5nb3YvY29udGVudC9wa2cvRlItMjAyMS0wMS0xOS9wZGYvMjAyMS0wMTAwMC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=]
announcing
the move the State Department writes that Ansarallah, also known as
Partisans of God, has committed or has attempted to commit, or poses a
significant risk of committing, or has participated in training to
commit, acts of terrorism that threaten the security of U.S. nationals
or the national security, foreign policy, or economy of the United
States.

The Biden administration did not waste much time caving into the
demands of leftist global entities to reverse the designation. Leading
the pack was the famously corrupt United Nations, which joined forces
with independent humanitarian organizations to demand Ansarallah be
removed from the government’s terrorist list. UN officials
expressed “deep concern about the adverse humanitarian impact

the decision to revoke

according to State Department announcement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53203&L=22405&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGUuZ292L3Jldm9jYXRpb24tb2YtdGhlLXRlcnJvcmlzdC1kZXNpZ25hdGlvbnMtb2YtYW5zYXJhbGxhaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTkyMzEwMTQ=].
“The revocations are intended to ensure that relevant U.S. policies
do not impede assistance to those already suffering what has been
called the world’s worst humanitarian crisis. By focusing on

It is worth noting that shortly after Blinken’s decision the U.S.
Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned
